name: Cauliflower Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 medium cauliflower heads, broken into florets
3/4 cup gruyere cheese or other hard cheese
Pepper to taste (including cayenne pepper to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the cauliflower in boiling salted water for 15 minutes, or until tender.
2. Meanwhile, cook the potatoes in boiling water for 15 minutes or longer, until tender. Drain the potatoes and cauliflower and place them in a mixing bowl.
3. Add the butter, salt, and pepper to the mixture. Mash together using a potato masher until a puree forms; avoid over-mixing so it doesn't become too mushy.
4. Beat the eggs into the puree one at a time, then stir in most of the cheese (reserving 2 tablespoons for topping).
5. Spoon the mixture into a greased dish and place foil on top. Bake in a moderate oven for 1 hour.
6. Before serving, sprinkle the reserved cheese on top and broil under the broiler until lightly browned. This can be prepared in advance and refrigerated overnight before baking. Total cooking time may be slightly less than 1 hour if your oven is set to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
